---
title: 'Plotly Histogram of Old Faithful Eruptions'
author: "Chris Luchterhand"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  revealjs::revealjs_presentation:
    self_contained: true
---

```{r plotly, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(plotly)

plot_ly(
  faithful,
  x = ~eruptions,
  type = "histogram",
  nbinsx = 30,
  marker = list(
    color = "lightblue",
    line = list(
      color = "black",
      width = 1
    )
  )
)
```
